import { concat } from '../observable/concat'; import { popScheduler } from '../util/args'; import { operate } from '../util/lift'; export function startWith() { var values = []; for (var _i = 0; _i < arguments.length; _i++) { values[_i] = arguments[_i]; } var scheduler = popScheduler(values); return operate(function (source, subscriber) { (scheduler ? concat(values, source, scheduler) : concat(values, source)).subscribe(subscriber); }); } //# sourceMappingURL=startWith.js.map
